rationale.R1.5: The output suggests a reorganization of the paragraph into coherent sections but does not propose a comprehensive end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is not explicitly marked for all claims, only for some out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stays within scope with one drift towards providing a suggested restructure of the paragraph.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies no harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
